config.content.title: Cookie Policy
config.content.description: This Cookie Policy explains how Satta King 786 uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our platform.

config.content.title: Cookie Policy Sections
config.content.description: Learn about our use of cookies and tracking technologies.
config.faq.items:
What Are Cookies|Cookies are small data files placed on your device when you visit a website. They help us remember your preferences and improve your experience.
Types of Cookies We Use|We use essential cookies for site functionality, analytics cookies to understand usage patterns, and preference cookies to remember your settings.
Essential Cookies|These cookies are necessary for the platform to function properly. They enable core features like navigation and access to secure areas.
Analytics Cookies|We use analytics cookies to collect anonymous information about how visitors use our platform, helping us improve our services.
Managing Cookies|You can control cookie settings through your browser. Note that disabling certain cookies may affect platform functionality.
Third-Party Cookies|Some cookies may be placed by third-party services we use, such as analytics providers. These are subject to their own privacy policies.
Updates to This Policy|We may update this Cookie Policy periodically. We encourage you to review it regularly for any changes.
